title: Artifactory
description:
Create based mod with exploration and RPG elements! 
Runs on Potato!
Public Server!
body:
![ARTIFACTORY banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Artifactory/BH_AF_header.webp)
![overview banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Artifactory/BH_AF_overview.webp)



A curated Create-centric modpack with RPG Elements, agricultural stuff, exploration and adventure stuff!

Enter a steampunk world of exploration and adventure with our Create mod-based modpack.
Discover new biomes and land features, build complex contraptions, and choose your own stats with RPG elements.
With new equipment and tones of new blocks and furniture, you can create your own steampunk paradise.
Start your journey today!


Runs on Potato!


Create! Wow!

More Swords! Neato!

Dungeons! Awesome!

More Towns! And towers!

Ease of Life Stuff!

Official Modpack Server! Neato!

![mods banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Artifactory/BH_AF_mods.webp)

Also the mods included below!
(these are not all the mods in the pack!)
